synopsis: Shortly after the Battle of Endor, Luke Skywalker trains with the Ewoks on the forest moon before Admiral Ackbar tasks him with visiting several worlds to invite their leaders to a planetary council for the new government. Accompanied by the Hoojib Plif, Luke's first stop is Iskalon, a world he last saw devastated by the Empire. There he finds Rik Duel's ship, the *Moonshadow*, salvaging the wreckage, with the infatuated Zeltron Dani again throwing herself at him. Luke and Plif are disgusted by Duel's scavenging, and a sea creature drawn up by the angered Iskalonians attacks the salvagers. The aquatic Iskalonians emerge to drive off the airbreathers until Kiro recognizes Luke and halts them. Their leader Mone, still distrustful of outsiders even after the Empire's defeat, asks Luke to leave and refuses to send any representative to the Alliance. Bored with his role on the planet, Kiro chooses to leave with the group anyway, boarding the *Moonshadow* since there is no room aboard Luke's X-wing.
title: Star Wars (1977) #82: Diplomacy
